caption: A man with short, white hair, a white beard, and glasses is positioned outdoors against a lush background of green foliage. He is wearing a black turtleneck sweater underneath a dark grey or black jacket featuring a textured, faux-fur collar. The man remains in a static close-up shot throughout the sequence. As the scene progresses, he maintains a neutral expression initially and then transitions into a slight, closed-mouth smile. His head remains relatively still, with only minor shifts in his facial expression and posture. No other people, objects, equipment, or on-screen text are visible in the scene. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the details of his clothing and the greenery behind him.
